output.code:
# Load the file
with open('/mnt/data/file-5rjnZDTeC4x1h4S7W442sT-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text

phrase = 'وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا'
text.count(phrase)

for i, idx in enumerate([m.start() for m in  __import__('re').finditer(phrase, text)]):
    print(i, idx)

spans = []
phrases = [
    ("Aya", "وَمَن يُشَاقِقِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ"),
    ("Aya", "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ كَفَرَ وَجَاءَ بِالْحَقِ وَجَاءَ بِهِ"),
    ("Hadeeth", "لا يُحِبُّ المُؤْمِنُ لِأَخِيهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِعلَ مُحَمَدٍ وَلا خِلَافَهُ"),
    ("Hadeeth", "لا تُؤَمِّلوا الْمُؤَمِّلَاتِ وَلا تُحِبُّوا الْمُحِبَّاتِ وَلا تَكُفُّوا الْمُكَفِّفَاتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُمَحَدًا"),
    # Actually there is a typo: "مُحَمَدًا" vs "مُمَحَدًا"? Let's get from text:
]

import re
quotes = re.findall(r'"([^"]+)"', text)
for i,q in enumerate(quotes):
    print(i, q)

spans_output = []
# For quotes 0 to 5 uniquely
for idx, span_text in enumerate(quotes[:6]):
    start = text.find(span_text)
    end = start + len(span_text)
    # verifying
    assert text[start:end] == span_text
    citation_type = "Aya" if idx in [0,1] else "Hadeeth"
    spans_output.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": citation_type})
# For duplicates, phrase = quotes[6]
phrase = quotes[6]
# find all occurrences
matches = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phrase), text)]
# take first 4
for start in matches[:4]:
    end = start + len(phrase)
    assert text[start:end] == phrase
    spans_output.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": phrase, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
# print
spans_output
